column1: 0,0,\uc0\u24858 \u32773 ,The Fool,"beginnings, freedom, leap of faith","new beginning
column12: missing the mark
column13: holding back","A call to begin before everything feels fully certain. Trust the pull toward something new, but stay aware of where your feet are landing.","A sign to notice where impulsiveness or fear is distorting your next step. You may be rushing blindly or hesitating under the excuse of needing more certainty.","cliff
column15: small bag
column16: sun",white,"silver ring","What would change if you trusted yourself enough to begin?","Take one small concrete step today."\

column12: trickery","You already have more tools than you think. The question is not whether you are ready, but whether you are willing to direct your energy clearly.","Your power may be leaking through distraction, insecurity, or performance. Gather yourself before trying to force an outcome.","wand
column15: infinity symbol",gold,"fountain pen","Where is your power already present, but underused?","Focus on one intention and act on it cleanly."\

column1: 2,2,\uc0\u22899 \u31085 \u21496 ,The High Priestess,"intuition, inner knowing, quiet truth","intuition
column12: disconnection from self","Not everything needs to be spoken yet. There is truth already forming inside you, and silence may be more useful than noise right now.","You may be ignoring what you already know. Confusion grows when you ask for answers outside yourself before listening within.","moon
column15: pillars",indigo,"moonstone necklace","What do you already know, even if you have not said it out loud yet?","Pause before reacting and listen inward first."\

column12: neglect","Something in your life is ready to be tended with warmth and patience. Growth comes not from pressure, but from consistent nourishment.","You may be emptying yourself while trying to care for everything else. What needs tending most may actually be you.","wheat
column15: forest",rose,"silk ribbon","What in your life needs gentle care instead of more force?","Create one small act of nourishment for yourself today."\

column12: lack of structure
column13: domination","This is a moment to stand in your own authority. Clear structure, boundaries, and responsibility will create the stability you want.","Control may be replacing wisdom. If things feel harsh, brittle, or exhausting, the structure you are using may no longer serve you.","throne
column15: ram
column16: stone","deep red",watch,"Where would more structure make your life easier, not harder?","Set one boundary or make one firm decision."\

column12: personal truth","There may be wisdom in tradition, ritual, or learned guidance right now. Not all structure is limitation
column13: some of it helps you deepen.","You may be outgrowing a belief system, a role, or a rule that no longer fits. Question what is meaningful and what is merely inherited.","keys
column15: robes
column16: blessing hand",ivory,"small key charm","Which values still feel alive to you, and which ones are only habit?","Keep one ritual that genuinely grounds you."\

column12: temptation","This card is about meaningful alignment, not just romance. A choice becomes clear when you ask what truly matches your values and heart.","You may be split between desire and truth, or between what feels good and what is actually aligned. Something may need honest naming.","angel
column15: sunlight","soft green","pair of earrings","What choice would feel most honest, even if it is not the easiest?","Choose the option that reduces inner contradiction."\

column12: overwhelm","You can move forward, but not by scattering yourself. Progress comes through direction, self-command, and commitment to the road ahead.","You may be pulled by competing forces or trying to move without a clear center. Slow down enough to reclaim your direction.","chariot
column15: city",navy,"car keychain","What would help you move with more direction and less friction?","Commit to one path for now and follow through."\

column12: aggression","Real strength is calm, not loud. You are being asked to meet intensity with steadiness, not force.","You may be underestimating yourself or letting fear make the room feel smaller than it is. Gentleness is not weakness, but it still needs backbone.","lion
column15: flowers",amber,bracelet,"Where can you respond with steadiness instead of force?","Stay soft, but do not back away from what matters."\

column12: fear of connection","Stepping back can help you see clearly. Not every answer comes in motion
column13: some arrive when you create space to hear yourself.","You may be hiding in solitude instead of being restored by it. Withdrawal is useful only if it eventually returns you to life.","lantern
column15: mountain path
column16: staff",grey,"small lantern charm","What truth becomes clearer when you stop seeking noise?","Take quiet time, then return with one insight."\

column12: lack of control","Life is moving, whether you force it or not. This may be a turning point where timing matters as much as effort.","You may be resisting a cycle that has already shifted. The more tightly you cling, the harder change can feel.","wheel
column15: winged figures","royal blue","coin purse","What cycle is ending, and what is trying to begin?","Work with the shift instead of against it."\

column12: rationalization","This card asks for honesty, especially with yourself. What is fair, true, and proportionate matters more than what is convenient.","You may be rationalizing what you already know is out of balance. Avoiding truth delays relief, not consequence.","scales
column15: stone throne",crimson,"metal hairpin","What truth becomes clear when emotion settles down?","Name the facts cleanly before making a decision."\

column12: attachment","This is not wasted time. A pause can change what the whole situation means, if you stop insisting on the old angle.","You may be stuck in suspension without gaining anything from it. Let go of the posture that keeps you in place.","tree
column15: rope",teal,"silk scarf","What changes when you stop demanding immediate movement?","Allow one perspective shift before taking action."\

column12: avoidance","Something has reached its natural ending. This card does not ask for fear
column13: it asks for honesty about what is already over.","You may be dragging something forward long after its life has passed. Refusing endings can make change feel harsher than it needs to be.","skeleton
column15: sunrise
column16: river",black,"obsidian stone","What are you trying to keep alive that is already asking to end?","Release one thing that no longer belongs in your life."\

column12: lack of harmony","Healing often looks like subtle adjustment, not dramatic change. You are being guided toward balance, not perfection.","Something may be off in your inner rhythm. Too much, too little, or badly matched energies are making life harder than it needs to be.","angel
column15: path to sun","light blue","glass cup","What would balance look like in practice, not just in theory?","Make one adjustment that restores your rhythm."\

column12: detachment","This card reveals where desire, fear, or habit has more control than you want to admit. Naming the pattern weakens its hold.","You may be closer to release than you think. A bond loses power the moment you see clearly that it can be undone.","chains
column15: dark pedestal","dark purple","black leather cord","What pattern keeps promising relief but leaves you less free?","Interrupt one compulsive loop today."\

column12: false stability","Something false or unstable can no longer hold. The disruption may feel harsh, but it also clears what illusion could not.","The shake-up may already be happening inside you, even if the outside still looks intact. Avoiding the truth will not preserve the structure.","tower
column15: falling crown","electric blue","metal ring","What truth breaks through when the old structure fails?","Let the false part fall instead of rebuilding it too fast."\

column12: loss of faith","There is something gentle and true returning to you. This card speaks of healing, trust, and the quiet kind of hope that does not need to perform.","You may feel disconnected from hope, but that does not mean it is gone. What is needed may be reconnection, not dramatic rescue.","star
column15: night sky","silver-blue","star charm","What still feels quietly alive inside you, even after disappointment?","Follow the smallest light instead of waiting for certainty."\

column11: reality check","Not everything is clear right now, and that is part of the card's message. Move gently through uncertainty instead of demanding daylight from midnight.","What was confusing may begin to show its shape. Fear loosens when what was hidden starts becoming nameable.","moon
column12: dogs
column14: water",pearl,"mirror compact","What are you feeling that logic alone cannot yet organize?","Move slowly and trust what becomes clearer over time."\

column12: doubt","This card brings visibility, warmth, and honest life-force. What is true becomes easier to see when you stop shrinking from your own brightness.","Light is still present, but something may be muting it. A small blockage, doubt, or overcomplication may be standing between you and simple joy.","sunflowers
column15: sun",yellow,"gold chain","Where would life feel simpler if you let yourself be fully seen?","Say yes to something that brings clean energy."\

column12: resistance","Something in you is being called awake. This is not punishment
column13: it is a moment of seeing clearly what must now be answered.","You may be holding yourself back through fear, shame, or refusal to hear the call. Avoiding the truth does not silence it.","angel
column15: rising figures
column16: mountains","white-gold","small bell","What part of your life is asking to be lived more honestly now?","Respond to the call in one visible way."\

column12: stuck","A cycle has reached coherence. This card speaks of completion, earned wholeness, and the ability to stand inside what you have become.","Something remains incomplete, not because you failed, but because one last piece still asks for attention. Closure needs participation.","wreath
column15: sky",emerald,"round pendant","What have you actually completed that deserves to be acknowledged?","Close one cycle well before starting the next."}
